_review_reason: Per Convention C: all benefits conditional/promotional. DashPass requires $10k annual spend (CONDITIONAL → exclude). 10% off monthly grocery/convenience order ($15 cap, expires 6/30/2026) is conditional + limited-time promotional → exclude. Cashback rates (4%/3%/2%/1%) = earnings, not RC.
_excluded: 10% off monthly Convenience/Grocery/Alcohol order, $15 cap, expires 6/30/2026 (limited-time + conditional)
